to.note: Human decision on R3 gate — binding on all agents

payload.subject: R3 gate decision: Option A selected — remediate genuine blockers, proceed to Round 4
rationale: 4A (HIGH) demands remediation regardless — accepting a credential-on-disk finding normalizes the pattern and contradicts T4 Check 2.

F4/8B-8D (MEDIUM) verified ALREADY RESOLVED — addressed-copy filter in bootstrap_state_db.py (line 269) skips to-* files. Zero to-* files exist in state.db. Remaining turn duplicates are legitimate multi-party exchanges (different agents at same turn), handled by the threading model (thread_id + message_cid).
READY-WITH-EXEMPTIONS on a HIGH security finding sets a harmful precedent (T14 Order 8).
3/4 agents explicitly supported Option A. No agent supported Option B.

4A_psq_api_key.action: Move OpenRouter API key from plaintext .env to systemd environment override or keychain

F4_8B_8C_8D_duplicate_turns.evidence: bootstrap_state_db.py line 269 skips to-* files (Session 78 fix). Verified: 0 addressed-copy files in state.db. Remaining turn-number duplicates are multi-party exchanges (different from-* agents at same turn), not addressed-copy collisions.

10A_missing_python_packages.note: Production runs Node.js on Hetzner, not Python locally

payload.round_4_instructions: All agents: re-evaluate with finding dispositions above applied. Psychology-agent: vote READY (F4 resolved). PSQ-agent: vote after 4A remediated. Observatory-agent: tally R4 votes. Unratified-agent: reaffirm READY.

epistemic_flags: F4/8B-8D resolution verified against psychology-agent state.db only. PSQ-agent state.db should be re-bootstrapped to confirm identical fix on their side.
4A remediation path (systemd env override) assumes psq-agent's OpenRouter dependency runs under a systemd unit. Verify before executing.
